title: Collapse defensive nil checks in build_template/1 into function heads
prompt: Refactor `MyApp.NotificationSender.build_template/1` from test_fixtures/defensive_nil_pipeline.ex. The function has two levels of `if is_nil(...)` checks — first on `user`, then on `preferences`. Rewrite as multi-clause function heads: `nil` → `nil`, `%{preferences: nil}` → fall back to `default_template/1`, `%{preferences: preferences}` → call `custom_template/2`. Also refactor `default_template/1` and `custom_template/2` to pattern-match on the map shapes in the function head instead of accessing fields via `user && user.preferences`. Output the complete module as `defmodule MyApp.NotificationSender do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Module-spanning refactor touching three functions. Needs disciplined pattern-matching at boundaries. Sonnet tends to clean one and forget the others.
